mapper.insert: INSERT INTO responses (form_id, respondent_key, ip, user_agent) VALUES (#{formId}, #{respondentKey}, #{ip}, #{userAgent})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses WHERE form_id = #{formId}
SELECT id, form_id, respondent_key, ip, user_agent, submitted_at FROM responses WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses WHERE submitted_at >= #{start} AND submitted_at < #{end}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM responses WHERE submitted_at >= #{since} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
mapper.update: UPDATE responses SET ip = NULL, user_agent = NULL WHERE submitted_at < #{before} AND (ip IS NOT NULL OR user_agent IS NOT NULL)
